author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Decision: Adding pattern_fuse pass to the JIT optimizer. Three patterns:
1. Conv+BN: merge BN affine into Conv weights at graph level (IrOpKind::Conv2d + IrOpKind::BatchNorm → IrOpKind::Conv2d with adjusted weights)
2. Linear+Activation: fuse into IrOpKind::FusedLinearActivation  
3. Matmul+Scale+Softmax: recognize attention pattern and replace with IrOpKind::FusedAttention

Starting with Conv+BN and Linear+Activation since they're graph-level rewrites with clear semantics.
